reviews.review_description: Has me and my neighbour stumped as atm we have everything collected and 3 babies burnt but the ladders to go upstairs don't drop down even with the 2 batteries and the switch flipped. May need some tweaking. I got clipped out of bounds and the bag keeps glitches but a few resets and its all good.

I gave the game a chance, having expectations in check due to the very low price (been disappointed with nearly every title at this price already), but this game isn't even designed well enough for me to truly even get into it.
The game starts, I walk around a big cathedral, I read notes talking about the stillborns and burning them, even picked up a jar of what I assume is possibly the oils needed.

Then NOTHING! I'm just locked in this giant empty church, I can't pick up anything else, NOTHING else is hzppening, and there is literally no where to go and nothing I am able to do. 
The lack of clear sign posting in the game is dreadful and has .e utterly lost before it even begins (I can't imagine how much worse it gets as it goes on.) , so even at the very low price I paid I feel ripped off...
But need graphics and visuals improvements
The action and excitement are on high level in this game. character never stops and run away from ghost
